title: WHIST — "OOOOH NOOOO" falling sine (Robotron)
tldr: Hand-coded routine producing a descending sine-ish whistle — the comedic "ohhh nooo" sound when something bad happens. Possibly a riff on the falling-bomb-whistle trope.
how: Custom routine that walks a sine-shape sample table while reducing the playback rate — sine pitch drops continuously. Possibly uses a per-iteration `LDX` into a small sine LUT with `GPER` slowly increasing.
see: **PLANE** — similar descending tone but square-wave instead of sine.
